'''Lexia Ginorra''', known superstitiously as "'''the Sith'''," was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Falling to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] after a ruinous run in with a [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]], Ginnora abandoned the Order and formed a vigilante group in the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Coruscant underworld]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Lexia Ginorra was inducted into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and received her [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. After being selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], Ginorra was stationed on [[Kamparas]]'s [[Kamparas Jedi Training Center|training center]] where she completed her own [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. On the path to become a [[Jedi Guardian/Legends|Jedi Guardian]], Padawan Ginorra was abducted while on a mission by a crime syndicate and gave into her fears, slaughtering her captors.<ref name="CCW" />

Realizing that she had violated the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]] and fearful of retribution by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] and her master, Ginorra abandoned the Order and fled into jungles of Kamparas. Eventually Ginorra made her way back to Coruscant where she established herself as the leader of a gang of vigilantes that preyed upon the criminal leaders in the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Coruscant underworld]]. As many crime lords placed bounties on her head, Ginorra wiped out several criminal organizations, slipping further and further into darkness. Despite the illegality of her actions, her reputation preceded her, becoming the protagonist in many a [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] officer's tales, gaining the name "the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]."<ref name="CCW" />
